flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Maryland Eastern Shore fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Maryland Eastern Shore rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 2.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Maryland Eastern Shore rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (14.7% → 17.4%).
